textByHash.c09ad2515630bc8de778617efe210ea64f1775f1: Wow, thanks for breaking me out of that ice! But please, my husband is still trapped in there!
textByHash.86f87c68fc6611809158f76a26a52fcf865d4364: Yes, I thought we were done for! Why ever did that nasty Kamil freeze us up there anyway?
textByHash.0c1a7175d4f80c7fd9ed3f5be9791fd79de9e018: Ooohhhhh, my poor baby! He must have been so worried about us...
textByHash.effeac994d8b4c5b5e5bb7af6d1ceab0ce623f5e: Don't you talk about my baby like that!
textByHash.f83fb0692b2b896e409aa6702b899000b278ea55: That's right son, it's your favorite tonight too! A big plate of raw mackerel!
textByHash.ec86d0606a4b741fab5bc77190bc1e82b172eb91: Thanks again for freeing me from that ice block! I don't know what my little snookums would have done without us!
